g.text: A. Coverage A — Dwelling
We cover:
1. The dwelling on the "residence premises" shown in the Declarations,
including structures attached to the dwelling.
2. Materials and supplies located on or next to the "residence premises"
used to construct, alter or repair the dwelling or other structures.
B. Coverage B — Other Structures
We cover other structures on the "residence premises" set apart from the
dwelling by clear space. This includes structures connected to the dwelling
by only a fence, utility line or similar connection.
C. Coverage C — Personal Property
We cover personal property owned or used by an "insured" while it is
anywhere in the world. After a loss, and at your request, we will cover
personal property owned by others while the property is on the part of the
"residence premises" occupied by an "insured."
D. Coverage D — Loss of Use
The limit of liability for Coverage D is the total limit for the coverages
described below:
1. Additional Living Expense.
2. Fair Rental Value.
3. Civil Authority Prohibits Use.
E. Additional Coverages
Subject to the policy provisions and the exclusions shown in Section I,
we provide the following additional coverages:
1. Debris Removal — up to 5% of the Coverage A limit.
2. Reasonable Repairs — to protect property from further damage.
3. Trees, Shrubs and Other Plants — up to 5% of Coverage A.
4. Fire Department Service Charge — up to $500.
5. Property Removed — for direct loss from any cause while removed.
6. Credit Card, Fund Transfer Card, Forgery — up to $500.
7. Loss Assessment — up to $1,000.
8. Collapse — as defined in Section I — Perils Insured Against.
9. Glass or Safety Glazing Material — repair or replacement.
10. Landlord's Furnishings — up to $2,500 in a rented unit.
11. Ordinance or Law — up to 10% of the Coverage A limit.
12. Grave Markers — up to $5,000.
